arts.ttl: I would be perfect transfer for Manchester United - and Ruben Amorim thinks so too
arts.sum: Manchester United transfer news with Geovany Quenda on Ruben Amorim's radar having impressed at Sporting Lisbon

arts.ttl: I fired Manchester United to the Treble - but Sir Alex Ferguson told me I was a failure
arts.sum: Man United's historic 1998/99 Treble-winning campaign was made possible by the goals of Dwight Yorke - but the moment his standards dropped, Sir Alex Ferguson made him know about it.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Red Devils eye 'next Mo Salah' as Marcus Rashford demand issued
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim finally has his first win as Manchester United boss and it already appears that he is putting thought into the Red Devils’ upcoming January transfer window

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche reveals why Everton blocked Man Utd from signing Jarrad Branthwaite
arts.sum: Manchester United made more than one attempt to lure Jarrad Branthwaite away from Everton in the summer, but Sean Dyche and the Toffees stood firm to keep hold of their star defender

arts.ttl: Vaclav Cerny urges Rangers to skip Europa League step as he lays down Man Utd and Tottenham challenge
arts.sum: The Czech is looking beyond just making the playoff round as he relishes blockbuster clashes with English big boys

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy reveals private talks with Man Utd rival before taking Leicester job
arts.sum: Leicester City have appointed Ruud van Nistelrooy as their new manager, and the Dutchman has detailed how a phone call with Enzo Maresca helped him decide to take the job

arts.ttl: Insider tips Leeds to make remarkable move for Premier League striker recently linked with Man Utd
arts.sum: Leeds United could be set to pull off a sensational swoop for talented Brighton striker Evan Ferguson in January. That’s according to the club’s former goalkeeper Paul Robinson, who believes a move to Elland Road could be hugely beneficial to both player and club. Outstanding Leeds star tipped to “leave the club” in the January […] The post Insider tips Leeds to make remarkable move for Premier League striker recently linked with Man Utd appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho has just left Ruben Amorim another Man United warning as Chelsea star shines again
arts.sum: Manchester United news as Jadon Sancho has made a fine start to life at Chelsea - and he's given Ruben Amorim another big warning sign after his impressive display in the UEFA Conference League

arts.ttl: 'Maybe it's destiny' - Amorim on Man Utd job & coaching philosophy
arts.sum: Manchester United's new manager Ruben Amorim sits down with BBC Sport's Mark Chapman to discuss his new job and coaching philosophy.

arts.ttl: Man Utd prepare Victor Osimhen swap deal offer
arts.sum: Man Utd are reportedly aiming to pay €40 million plus Zirkzee to sign Osimhen next summer, although it remains to be seen if Napoli will accept such a deal. While Man Utd continue to be linked with a move for Osimhen, and Viktor Gyokeres for that matter, Rasmus Hojlund stated his claim for a starting berth with his performance against Bodo/Glimt on Thursday night.
